# Local vendor libraries (offline use)

All third-party assets are bundled locally for running in air-gapped/organization environments without internet.

| Library | Version | Source |
|---------|---------|--------|
| vis-network | 9.1.2 | unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.2/standalone/umd/vis-network.min.js |
| Font Awesome | 6.5.1 | @fortawesome/fontawesome-free (jsDelivr) |

To update: re-download from the sources above and place in the correct paths.
